---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---
```{=html}
<div style="padding:3rem 6vw; max-width:800px; margin:0 auto;">

  <div style="margin-bottom:3rem;">
    <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.15em; color:#f0a500; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:0.5rem;">// soumettre</p>
    <h1 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:clamp(1.8rem,4vw,2.8rem); font-weight:800; color:#e8e4d9; margin:0 0 0.75rem 0;">Montre ce que tu construis.</h1>
    <p style="color:#6b7280; font-size:0.95rem; line-height:1.8; max-width:520px;">
      Tu es praticien tech ? Soumets ton profil, un article ou une réalisation.
      Je valide et publie sous 48h.
    </p>
  </div>

  <!-- 3 cartes -->
  <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(220px,1fr)); gap:1.25rem; margin-bottom:3rem;">

    <!-- Profil -->
    <div id="card-profil"
         onclick="showForm('profil')"
         style="background:#12141a; border:1px solid #1e2128; border-radius:6px; padding:1.75rem; cursor:pointer; transition:border-color 0.2s;"
         onmouseover="this.style.borderColor='#f0a500'" onmouseout="if(activeForm!='profil') this.style.borderColor='#1e2128'">
      <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.68rem; letter-spacing:0.12em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#f0a500; margin-bottom:1rem;">01</p>
      <h3 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:1rem; font-weight:700; color:#e8e4d9; margin:0 0 0.5rem 0;">Mon profil</h3>
      <p style="font-size:0.83rem; color:#9ca3af; line-height:1.6; margin:0;">Figurer dans l'annuaire des praticiens.</p>
    </div>

    <!-- Article -->
    <div id="card-article"
         onclick="showForm('article')"
         style="background:#12141a; border:1px solid #1e2128; border-radius:6px; padding:1.75rem; cursor:pointer; transition:border-color 0.2s;"
         onmouseover="this.style.borderColor='#f0a500'" onmouseout="if(activeForm!='article') this.style.borderColor='#1e2128'">
      <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.68rem; letter-spacing:0.12em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#f0a500; margin-bottom:1rem;">02</p>
      <h3 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:1rem; font-weight:700; color:#e8e4d9; margin:0 0 0.5rem 0;">Un article</h3>
      <p style="font-size:0.83rem; color:#9ca3af; line-height:1.6; margin:0;">Partager un article publié sur Medium, LinkedIn, Dev.to...</p>
    </div>

    <!-- Réalisation -->
    <div id="card-realisation"
         onclick="showForm('realisation')"
         style="background:#12141a; border:1px solid #1e2128; border-radius:6px; padding:1.75rem; cursor:pointer; transition:border-color 0.2s;"
         onmouseover="this.style.borderColor='#f0a500'" onmouseout="if(activeForm!='realisation') this.style.borderColor='#1e2128'">
      <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.68rem; letter-spacing:0.12em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#f0a500; margin-bottom:1rem;">03</p>
      <h3 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:1rem; font-weight:700; color:#e8e4d9; margin:0 0 0.5rem 0;">Une réalisation</h3>
      <p style="font-size:0.83rem; color:#9ca3af; line-height:1.6; margin:0;">Pipeline, dashboard, API, bootcamp, chaîne YT...</p>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- Zone formulaire Tally -->
  <div id="form-zone" style="display:none;">

    <div style="border-top:1px solid #1e2128; padding-top:2rem;">
      <p id="form-label" style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.72rem; color:#f0a500; letter-spacing:0.1em; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:1.5rem;"></p>

      <!-- Tally iframes — un seul visible à la fois -->
      <iframe id="tally-profil"
        style="display:none; width:100%; border:none; border-radius:6px; min-height:600px;"
        src="https://tally.so/embed/GxLlv2?hideTitle=1&transparentBackground=1&dynamicHeight=1"
        loading="lazy">
      </iframe>

      <iframe id="tally-article"
        style="display:none; width:100%; border:none; border-radius:6px; min-height:600px;"
        src="https://tally.so/embed/BzZ7zA?hideTitle=1&transparentBackground=1&dynamicHeight=1"
        loading="lazy">
      </iframe>

      <iframe id="tally-realisation"
        style="display:none; width:100%; border:none; border-radius:6px; min-height:600px;"
        src="https://tally.so/embed/q4OVLk?hideTitle=1&transparentBackground=1&dynamicHeight=1"
        loading="lazy">
      </iframe>

    </div>
  </div>

  <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.72rem; color:#6b7280; margin-top:3rem; line-height:1.8;">
    Délai de publication : 48h max · Je valide chaque soumission manuellement.
  </p>

</div>

<script>
let activeForm = null;

function showForm(type) {
  // Reset cartes
  ['profil','article','realisation'].forEach(t => {
    document.getElementById('card-' + t).style.borderColor = '#1e2128';
  });

  // Active la carte cliquée
  document.getElementById('card-' + type).style.borderColor = '#f0a500';
  activeForm = type;

  // Labels
  const labels = {
    profil:      '01 — Soumettre mon profil',
    article:     '02 — Soumettre un article',
    realisation: '03 — Soumettre une réalisation'
  };
  document.getElementById('form-label').textContent = labels[type];

  // Cache tous les iframes
  ['profil','article','realisation'].forEach(t => {
    document.getElementById('tally-' + t).style.display = 'none';
  });

  // Affiche le bon
  document.getElementById('tally-' + type).style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('form-zone').style.display = 'block';

  // Scroll vers le formulaire
  document.getElementById('form-zone').scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
}
</script>
```
